concept: A rigid, symmetrical hexagonal maze structure that is strictly bisected. The left side represents cold order, while the right side fractures into scattered geometric shards.
A stylized, surreal technological halo floating above a different decaying cybernetic organ for each chapter, representing the merger of the divine, the mechanical, and the mortal.
A single, continuous, delicate fine line drawing that starts as a taut, straight wire and violently snaps into a messy, looping tangle representing a specific fractured bone.
A clinical, highly ornamental vignette combining a metallic syringe tip interwoven with decaying baroque anatomical flora.
medium: Traditional woodcut printmaking with heavy stippling.
